gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor smiles warmly, opens both arms wide, and gently sways side to side while announcing the lesson
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head inquisitively, and gestures with one hand encouragingly toward the students
a tutor holds up one arm, displaying three fingers while articulating each shape name clearly and enthusiastically
a person steps back with both arms raised high, illustrating the act of describing shapes and highlighting their features
a tutor moves closer to the shapes, crouching slightly and pointing with excitement at the variety available for discovery
a person looks around with anticipation, gestures in a circular motion with both hands, and encourages students to spot the round shape
a tutor claps hands together joyfully, nods in approval, and beams proudly at the students for their newfound knowledge
a person gently waves goodbye with one hand while gesturing outward, inviting students to continue their shape exploration daily
